title: Lesser & Pavey Madelaine by Hearts Design Xmas Madelaine Pamper Set For Women & Men | Luxury Bath Bombs, Shower Creams & Bubble Bath | Travel Wash Kit and Cruelty-Free Hydrating Gift For All
features: COMPLETE BATH & SHOWER INDULGENCE: Includes bath bombs, bubble bath, and shower creams for a pampering experience that softens skin and refreshes the senses—ideal for girls, teens, and women alike.
HYDRATING FORMULA FOR DAILY CARE: Each item is crafted with moisturising natural ingredients to nourish and protect, making it perfect for dry skin and those seeking a gentle, luxurious cleanse.
COMPACT & TRAVEL FRIENDLY DESIGN: Convenient mini shower gels and bath items are easy to carry, making this pamper set a practical travel wash solution for holidays or overnight getaways.

VEGAN FRIENDLY & CRUELTY FREE BEAUTY: All items in this skincare collection are created with care and ethics in mind—suitable for conscious users who value sustainability and animal-friendly products.
IDEAL GIFT SET FOR SPECIAL OCCASIONS: Whether it's a Christmas, birthday, or self-care treat, this beautifully packaged bath gift set is a perfect choice for women, teenage girls, and even kids.
